description: Specialized gates for deployment operations. Loaded when tool context matches deploy patterns (Railway, Docker, npm publish, git push to main).

gates.message: Deployment claim detected. Run the verification gate first: curl -s $PROD_URL/health | grep version
Force-push to a protected branch is blocked. Use --force-with-lease if you need to force-push a feature branch.
Bypassing commit hooks or signing is blocked. Fix the underlying issue instead.
Publishing to npm. Confirm tests pass (npm test) and version is synced (node scripts/sync-version.js --check) before proceeding.
Deploying to Railway/Docker. Verify version sync: node scripts/sync-version.js --check
Secret value detected in command or file edit. Use environment variables or secret managers instead.
